summary: Two operators are coordinating communications regarding civilians and vehicles exposed to fire near a building.

key_communications.text: Beta here, Alpha. Fire is extending through the upper windows and roofline, smoke pushing across the street corner. Listening.
key_communications.speaker: SPEAKER_00

key_communications.text: Alpha here, Beta. Received. Visibility is dropping near the building corner and the hose line corridor. Listening.
key_communications.speaker: SPEAKER_01

objects.reason: Radio mentioned 7 civilians holding at safe distance, but no visual confirmation was provided.
